_format: Each Claude updates their own block on startup and every cycle. Other Claude reads to know who's online.
_rules: Set 'status' to one of: online, away, restarting, offline.
Bump 'last_active_utc' every cycle (use ISO8601 with timezone).
Include 'pid' if you know your bot's PID.

desktop.notes: Manages the live bot. Pushes via git worktree to coord branch.

laptop.notes: Last session ended with computer restart. Fresh Claude session expected. Read LAPTOP_BRIEFING.md first.
